name: Create Multi-Page Lesson Opener Flipchart
description: A 7th grade social studies teacher needs a lesson opener flipchart for a unit on the American Revolution. Create a 3-page flipchart where Page 1 is titled 'Do Now' and includes the phrase 'American Revolution' in a prompt about student knowledge; Page 2 is titled 'Learning Objectives' (or 'Objectives') and lists at least two goals; and Page 3 is titled 'Vocabulary' (or 'Key Vocabulary') and contains four colored rectangle boxes for the terms Revolution, Colony, Independence, and Patriot. Login as ga / password123 and save the flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/american_revolution_opener.flipchart
